meta.maintenanceInstruction: KEEP THE PLAN UP TO DATE AS YOU EVOLVE THE CODE. DEVIATIONS TO THE PLAN MUST BE LOGGED WITHIN THE PLAN. THE PLAN MUST BE REASSESSED HOLISTICALLY AFTER ANY CHANGE OF ANY SIZE.
meta.completionPolicy: YOU ARE NOT DONE UNTIL YOU HAVE COMPLETED 100% OF THE BLUEPRINT. DO NOT STOP. YOU MUST REFINE AT REGULAR INTERVALS TO KEEP THE BLUEPRINT FULL. NEVER SPECIFY ANY ESTIMATE OF EFFORT OR COST — ESPECIALLY NOT TIME ESTIMATES. NEVER SPECIFY A PRIORITY OF ANY KIND.

globalAlerts.warning: CRITICAL LOCAL INTEGRATION REQUIREMENT: The agent is running on a machine that has the 'claude' CLI installed. You absolutely MUST run `make integration-test-prsplit` and other integration targets defined in `project.mk` during development. Standard checks like `make all` are insufficient on their own because they skip these tests.

HARD MANDATE (NO EXCEPTIONS): For EVERY bug/regression, you MUST (1) replicate with HIGH CONFIDENCE via a failing test, (2) validate that replication FAILS via make target, and ONLY THEN (3) apply a fix. No exceptions.
ANTI-HALLUCINATION CONSTRAINT: Do NOT invent root causes or describe nonexistent logic. If you have not read the relevant code paths, add an investigation task.
TOOLING REQUIREMENT: All verification MUST use the make-based workflow. Cross-platform checks MUST pass (make all). macOS-only integration tests via project.mk targets.
RULE OF TWO (COMMIT GATE): No commits until two contiguous, issue-free subagent strict reviews confirm correctness.
INDEFINITE CYCLE: The task list must never become empty. Always expand scope towards True Perfection.

mandatoryDirectives.contextManagement: Execute tasks strictly in sequence. Update blueprint.json incrementally after each task.
mandatoryDirectives.sourceOfTruth: Live chunks: internal/command/pr_split_00_core.js through pr_split_13_tui.js (14 IIFE-wrapped files). Go bridge: internal/command/pr_split.go (embeds + loads all chunks via loadChunkedScript). Tests: 46+ test files in internal/command/ matching pr_split_*_test.go and prsplit_*_test.go. Chunk test helper: loadChunkEngine() in pr_split_00_core_test.go (auto-injects t.TempDir runtime.dir). Full engine helpers: loadPrSplitEngine()/loadPrSplitEngineWithEval() in pr_split_test.go. TUI: prsplit_autosplit_model.go (AutoSplitModel), prsplit_plan_editor.go (PlanEditor). Design doc: docs/architecture-pr-split-chunks.md. ADR: docs/adr/001-pr-split-chunked-architecture.md (R41).
mandatoryDirectives.fullEndToEndIntegrationTesting: The -integration flag, -claude-command, -claude-arg flags registered in internal/command/main_test.go TestMain. project.mk targets: integration-test-prsplit, integration-test-prsplit-mcp, integration-test-termmux, integration-test-vterm. New test functions in internal/command/ matching TestIntegration_* are automatically picked up by make integration-test-prsplit-mcp.
mandatoryDirectives.chunkArchitecture: 14 JS chunk files loaded in order by pr_split.go (loadChunkedScript). Each chunk is an IIFE that attaches exports to globalThis.prSplit (initialized by chunk 00). Chunks may reference symbols from earlier chunks via globalThis.prSplit. Go-injected globals (autoSplitTUI, tuiMux, splitView, planEditorFactory, prSplitConfig) are available to all chunks.

statusSection.currentState: Build GREEN. All tests pass (make all). 15 commands registered. 14 JS chunk files loaded sequentially. 46+ pr-split test files providing extensive coverage. Three bugs fixed (B00: git state mutation, B01: ANSI→lipgloss, B02: PR creation guards). All orphaned claude-mux code deleted. TUI components relocated to internal/command. Documentation updated. Cross-platform validated (Linux container + Windows). wip branch at e2580ac.
statusSection.goalState: 14 independently-testable chunk files (all populated, no stubs). All orphaned claude-mux code deleted. TUI decoupled from termmux. All stale monolith references removed. Documentation current. Cross-platform validated. Wizard UI (W-series) implemented in JS. Every line has a reason to exist.

replanLog.description: Expose internal/termmux to JS via internal/builtin/termmux/ package. Pane management, visibility, resize. Core termmux MUST NOT contain goja bindings.
replanLog.acceptance: JS facade implemented. Bindings localized to internal/builtin/termmux. All code is covered via new automated tests / checks and all checks pass. Design the API surface carefully, taking note of the other implementations, e.g. for osm:bubbletea, osm:bt, osm:pabt, etc, as past examples of similarly complex, Go-heavy integrations. It must be possible to implement POWERFULL JAVASCRIPT-DEFINED BEHAVIOR that is **properly non-blocking in JavaScript** (i.e. does not rely on blocking calls to Go) using this API. This is critical for the success of the Wizard UI, which will run entirely in JS and must be able to orchestrate complex interactions with termmux without blocking the JS event loop. The API should be designed with an event-driven architecture in mind, allowing JS code to subscribe to termmux events and react accordingly, rather than relying on synchronous calls that could lead to a poor user experience. Additionally, ideally, bubbletea is able to integrate _directly_ with termmux panes via this facade, allowing for a more seamless UI experience. This may require some careful design to ensure that the event handling and state management between termmux and bubbletea are well-coordinated. Examples of challenging aspects include signal handling. It may be necessary to integrate with the event loop. N.B. Integrating with bubbletea is a critical part of realising the maximum potential of this implementation. Spare no expense.

replanLog.task: W01: Wizard UI Phase 1 - State Machine Design
replanLog.description: Design state machine in pr_split_13_tui.js using osm:bt/bubbles/bubblezone. States: Config, Plan Gen, Plan Review, Branch Building, Error Resolution, Finalization.
replanLog.acceptance: JS state definitions implemented. Docs updated. All code is covered via new automated tests / checks and all checks pass.

replanLog.task: W02: Wizard UI Phase 2 - Configuration & Baseline Validation
replanLog.description: Configuration stage. Run baseline verification interactively. On failure: pause with clear UI, allow override or abort.
replanLog.acceptance: Baseline failure shows clear JS menu. Re-evaluates on override. All code is covered via new automated tests / checks and all checks pass.

replanLog.task: W03: Wizard UI Phase 3 - Interactive Plan Review Editor
replanLog.description: Port PlanEditor to JS. Wire plan generation. Detect schema invalidity. Allow retry with feedback or manual override.
replanLog.acceptance: User reviews plan in pure-JS TUI. Auto-Retry and manual overrides work. All code is covered via new automated tests / checks and all checks pass.

replanLog.task: W04: Wizard UI Phase 4 - Granular Branch Check Pipeline
replanLog.description: Sequential/concurrent branch evaluation via JS. Create, apply, verify per branch. Report pass/fail to JS UI.
replanLog.acceptance: Individual branch evaluation. Clear pass/fail status. All code is covered via new automated tests / checks and all checks pass .

replanLog.task: W05: Wizard UI Phase 5 - Interactive Error Resolution
replanLog.description: Error resolution for failed branches in JS TUI. Menu: Auto-Resolve, Manual Fix, Abort.
replanLog.acceptance: Failed branch shows resolution menu. Auto-Resolve applies patch and retries. All code is covered via new automated tests / checks and all checks pass .

replanLog.task: W06: Wizard UI Phase 6 - End-to-End Orchestration
replanLog.description: Finalize JS orchestration. Clean termination. Delete old Go TUI code.
replanLog.acceptance: osm pr-split navigates full flow via JS. Old Go TUI removed. All code is covered via new automated tests / checks and all checks pass  .
3+ simulation tests pass on make all. All code is covered via new automated tests / checks and all checks pass  .

replanLog.task: W08: Termmux Bell Interception & OS Notification
replanLog.description: Intercept ASCII BELL in termmux. OS notification + visual TUI indicator. Expose to JS Facade.
replanLog.acceptance: Bell intercepted. OS notification fires. Integration tests prove propagation. All code is covered via new automated tests / checks and all checks pass   .

replanLog.description: Persistent overlay showing hidden Claude process state. Activity indicators from PTY writes.
replanLog.acceptance: HUD renders. State accurately reflected. Clean rendering. All code is covered via new automated tests / checks and all checks pass  .

replanLog.description: BubbleTea mouse events in termmux. Click HUD to swap. Draggable overlay.
replanLog.acceptance: Mouse click toggles panes. Drag repositions. All code is covered via new automated tests / checks and all checks pass    .

replanLog.task: W10a: Remove Session ID from Auto-Split MCP
replanLog.description: Strip session metadata from MCP payloads. Process callbacks via socket identity only.
replanLog.acceptance: No session IDs in payloads. Integration tests prove functionality. All code is covered via new automated tests / checks and all checks pass  .

replanLog.task: W10b: Remove socat, Native Windows IPC
replanLog.description: Replace socat with native Go IPC. Named pipes or direct sockets. Must work on Windows.
replanLog.acceptance: osm pr-split works without socat. All platforms pass integration tests. All code is covered via new automated tests / checks and all checks pass   .

replanLog.task: W11: API Tidy & Breaking Changes Review
replanLog.description: Holistic review across all Wizard changes. Signal handling. Embrace breaking internal changes for quality.
replanLog.acceptance: All internal APIs clean. Integration tests stable. All code is covered via new automated tests / checks and all checks pass  .

replanLog.description: Use temporary git worktree for split validations. User CWD never touched.
replanLog.acceptance: Separate worktree used. User CWD undisturbed. Integration test proves safety. All code is covered via new automated tests / checks and all checks pass  .

replanLog.task: W13: Wizard Error Handling Beyond Git Rebase
replanLog.description: Error handling as primary feature. Auto-retry with Claude, drop to subshell, skip branch.
replanLog.acceptance: Wizard pauses on failure with options. Subshell drop-in works. State machine uncorrupted. All code is covered via new automated tests / checks and all checks pass  .

replanLog.task: W14: Integration Tests for Error Recovery Paths
replanLog.description: Comprehensive tests for W13 error flows. Deterministic mocked failures. TUI inspection.
replanLog.acceptance: All error resolution paths tested. Near-maximum coverage. All code is covered via new automated tests / checks and all checks pass  .

continuousVerification.task: CRITICAL: Run make pipeline AND ALL LOCAL INTEGRATION TESTS after EVERY significant change
continuousVerification.description: MANDATORY: Run make all AND make integration-test-prsplit-mcp AND make integration-test-vterm AND make integration-test-termmux after every change batch. For real-Claude tests: make integration-test-prsplit. For Linux: make make-all-in-container.
continuousVerification.failPolicy: If ANY check fails, STOP IMMEDIATELY and fix. Zero tolerance for flaky tests.

finalEnforcementProtocol.alert: Do not claim a regression is fixed without test evidence.
No commits until two contiguous, issue-free subagent reviews confirm correctness.
